sales_profit_ath.name: Sales & Profit @ ATH, Price near 52WH
sales_profit_ath.description: Companies with sales & profit at ATH, price within 25% of 52WH, low debt, low retail
sales_profit_ath.formula: MCap > 250 AND DE < 0.6 AND Retail < 25 AND Near52WH < 25% AND Sales ATH AND Profit ATH

smart_money_accumulation.name: Smart Money Accumulation
smart_money_accumulation.description: FII+DII increasing, retail decreasing — institutional buying
smart_money_accumulation.formula: FII ↑ AND DII ↑ AND Retail ↓ AND MCap > 500

growth_near_high.name: Growth Companies near 52WH/ATH
growth_near_high.description: Growing sales & profit, good margins, low debt, near highs
growth_near_high.formula: Sales↑ AND NP↑ AND NPM > 9 AND ROCE > 12 AND MCap > 250 AND DE < 0.6 AND Near52WH

heavy_capex_near_high.name: Heavy CapEx near 52WH/ATH
heavy_capex_near_high.description: Companies doing heavy capital expenditure, near highs — capacity expansion
heavy_capex_near_high.formula: CapEx growing AND CapEx/Sales > 5% AND MCap > 500 AND Near52WH AND ROCE > 8

emerging_winners.name: Emerging Winners near 52WH/ATH
emerging_winners.description: Strong growth 15%+, improving institutional ownership, or turning profitable
emerging_winners.formula: (Rev+EPS >15% QoQ+YoY) OR (Inst↑ Retail↓10%) OR (Turning profitable) AND MCap>400 DE<0.8 PEG<1.6

blockbuster_earnings.name: Blockbuster Quarterly Earnings
blockbuster_earnings.description: EPS+Sales >25% growth, expanding margins, healthy cash, MCap 500-20K Cr
blockbuster_earnings.formula: MCap 500-20K AND EPS QoQ >25% AND DE < 1 AND FCF > 0 AND Sales QoQ >25% AND OPM↑

strong_fundamentals.name: Strong Fundamentals
strong_fundamentals.description: ROCE>10, ROE>10, DE<1, consistent growth, FCF+, good margins
strong_fundamentals.formula: ROCE>10 ROE>10 DE<1 Sales3yrCAGR>10 NP3yrCAGR>10 FCF>0 OPM>10 NPM>6

technofunda_growth.name: TechnoFunda Growth
technofunda_growth.description: Good quarterly growth in sales & operating profit with decent ROCE
technofunda_growth.formula: MCap>400 SalesGr QoQ+YoY >8% OPGr QoQ+YoY >8% ROCE>8
